title: eriosema pilosum
intro: Eriosema pilosum, also known as the hairy bean tree, is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriosema pilosum include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Eriosema pilosum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
